metadata.description: Required. A unique prefix for all resources in this deployment (3-20 chars).
Optional. Azure location for the solution. Defaults to the resource group location.
Optional. A unique token for the solution. Used to ensure resource names are unique.
Optional. GPT model deployment type.
Optional. Name of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Version of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Capacity of the GPT model deployment.
Optional. Name of the Text Embedding model to deploy.
Optional. Version of the Text Embedding model to deploy.
Optional. Capacity of the Text Embedding model deployment.
Optional. Existing Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID.
Optional. Tags to apply to all deployed Azure resources.
Optional. Enable monitoring (LAW + App Insights + diagnostics). Defaults to false.
Optional. Enable redundancy (zone-redundancy, HA failover). Defaults to false.
Optional. Enable scalability (larger search SKU, etc.). Defaults to false.
Optional. Accepted for signature parity with the AVM flavor. Vanilla Microsoft.* resources have no telemetry hook, so this is a no-op in the bicep flavor.
Required. Azure region for AI Foundry / OpenAI deployment.
Optional. User identifier embedded in resource group tags.
Required. The name of the solution suffix used to derive the identity name.
Optional. Azure region where the identity will be deployed.
Optional. Tags to apply to the identity.
Resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity.
Name of the user-assigned managed identity.
Client ID of the managed identity.
Principal (object) ID of the managed identity.
Tenant ID of the managed identity.
Required. The name of the solution suffix used to derive the workspace name.
Optional. Azure region where the workspace will be deployed.
Optional. The resource ID of an existing Log Analytics workspace. If empty, a new one is created.
Optional. Tags to apply to the workspace.
Optional. Retention period in days. WAF recommends 365.
Optional. SKU name for the workspace.
Optional. Daily quota in GB. Pass null/0 for no cap.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace.
Resource group of the workspace.
Subscription ID hosting the workspace.
Required. The name of the solution suffix used to derive the resource name.
Optional. Azure region where the component will be deployed.
Required. Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace to send telemetry to.
Optional. Tags to apply to the resource.
Optional. Retention period in days.
Optional. Component kind (web, java, etc.).
Optional. Telemetry application type.
Optional. Disables IP masking for collected telemetry.
Optional. Telemetry flow type.
Resource ID of the Application Insights component.
Name of the Application Insights component.
Application Insights connection string.
Application Insights instrumentation key.
Required. Name of the Storage Account (3-24 chars, lowercase alphanumeric).
Optional. Azure region for the Storage Account.
Optional. Tags to apply.
Optional. SKU name.
Optional. Access tier (Hot, Cool, Cold).
Optional. Blob container name used by KernelMemory.
Optional. Principal ID of the managed identity to grant Storage Blob Data Contributor to. Empty skips the assignment.
Resource ID of the Storage Account.
Name of the Storage Account.
Primary blob endpoint.
Primary queue endpoint.
Name of the KernelMemory blob container.
Required. Name of the Cosmos DB account.
Optional. Azure region for the primary account location.
Optional. Tags to apply.
Optional. MongoDB server version.
Optional. Name of the default MongoDB database to provision.
Optional. Default consistency level for reads.
Optional. Maximum interval in seconds for bounded staleness.
Optional. Maximum staleness prefix for bounded staleness.
Optional. Enable analytical storage on the account.
Optional. Enable zone redundancy for the primary write region.
Optional. Enable automatic failover and configure HA region.
Optional. Azure region for the HA replica (required when enableAutomaticFailover is true).

properties.locations: [if(and(parameters('enableAutomaticFailover'), not(empty(parameters('haLocation')))), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', true()), createObject('locationName', parameters('haLocation'), 'failoverPriority', 1, 'isZoneRedundant', true())), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', parameters('zoneRedundant'))))]

metadata.description: Resource ID of the Cosmos DB account.
Name of the Cosmos DB account.
Name of the default MongoDB database.
Primary MongoDB connection string. WARNING: contains a key — store in Key Vault and avoid logging.
Required. Name of the OpenAI account (also used as the custom subdomain).
Optional. Azure region for the account.
Optional. Tags to apply.
Optional. SKU for the Cognitive Services account.
Optional. Disable local (key-based) authentication. Recommended when using managed identity.
Optional. Principal ID of a managed identity to grant OpenAI roles to. Empty skips role assignments.
Optional. List of model deployments to create. Each entry: { name, model: { format, name, version }, sku: { name, capacity } }.
Resource ID of the OpenAI account.
Name of the OpenAI account.
OpenAI inference endpoint.
Names of the created model deployments.
Required. Name of the Document Intelligence account (also used as the custom subdomain).
Optional. Azure region for the account.
Optional. Tags to apply.
Optional. SKU for the Cognitive Services account.
Optional. Disable local (key-based) authentication.
Optional. Principal ID of a managed identity to grant Cognitive Services User to. Empty skips role assignment.
Resource ID of the Document Intelligence account.
Name of the Document Intelligence account.
Document Intelligence endpoint URI.
Required. Name of the AI Search service.
Optional. Azure region for the service.
Optional. Tags to apply.
Optional. SKU name. Use `standard` for production / scalability scenarios.
Optional. Number of replicas (search units serving query traffic).
Optional. Number of partitions (data shards).
Optional. Semantic search tier.
Optional. Resource ID of a user-assigned managed identity to attach. Empty uses no identity.
Optional. Resource ID of a Log Analytics workspace for diagnostics. Empty disables diagnostics.
Optional. Principal ID of a managed identity to grant Search Index Data roles to. Empty skips role assignments.
Resource ID of the AI Search service.
Name of the AI Search service.
AI Search service endpoint.
Required. Name of the managed cluster.
Optional. Azure region for the cluster.
Optional. Tags to apply.
Optional. Kubernetes version (must be a version supported in the target region).
Optional. DNS prefix used by the API server endpoint.
Optional. VM size for the system node pool.
Optional. Initial node count for the system pool.
Optional. Minimum node count for the autoscaler.
Optional. Maximum node count for the autoscaler.
Optional. Service CIDR used by the cluster.
Optional. DNS service IP (must be inside serviceCidr).
Optional. Network plugin.
Optional. Network policy.
Optional. Resource ID of a Log Analytics workspace for OMS agent / diagnostics. Empty disables monitoring integrations.
Optional. Principal ID of a managed identity to grant Contributor on the cluster. Empty skips role assignment.
Resource ID of the AKS managed cluster.
Name of the AKS managed cluster.
Principal ID of the AKS cluster system-assigned identity (used to grant AcrPull on the registry).
Principal ID of the kubelet identity (used by node pools to pull images from ACR). NOTE: equals the system-assigned identity principal ID when no kubelet identity override is configured.
FQDN of the cluster control plane.
Required. Name of the Container Registry (5-50 chars, lowercase alphanumeric).
Optional. Azure region for the registry.
Optional. Tags to apply.
Optional. SKU name.
Optional. Enable admin user access (key-based). Recommended off when using managed identity.
Optional. Public network access. `Disabled` only valid with Premium SKU.
Optional. Enable zone redundancy. Only valid with Premium SKU in supported regions.
Optional. Principal ID to grant AcrPull to (e.g. AKS kubelet identity). Empty skips role assignment.
Resource ID of the Container Registry.
Name of the Container Registry.
Login server FQDN of the Container Registry.
Required. Name of the App Configuration store.
Optional. Azure region for the store.
Optional. Tags to apply.
Optional. SKU name.
Optional. Disable local (key-based) authentication. Recommended when using managed identity.
Optional. Principal ID of the identity to grant App Configuration Data Reader to. Empty skips assignment.
Optional. Key/value pairs to seed in the store. Each item: { name: string, value: string, contentType: string? }.
Resource ID of the App Configuration store.
Name of the App Configuration store.
App Configuration endpoint URI.

Contains Resource Group ID.

Contains Azure Cognitive Service (Document Intelligence) Endpoint.

Contains Azure Container Registry Name.

Contains Azure OpenAI Service Endpoint.
Contains Azure Search Service Endpoint.
